manifest: ABC-IO v2.0 redot2 — Final System Manifest
tagline: 100 Years Nonstop — Always On, Always Yours, Always Here

owner_gated_external_actions.item: Namecheap DNS A records for abc-io.com, www, ai1, ai2, and optional subdomains must be configured by the domain owner.
VPS SSH access to redot1 (162.254.32.142), ai1 (192.227.212.235), and ai2 (192.227.212.237) is required for remote deployment.
Stripe dashboard credentials, webhook endpoints, and price IDs must be finalized in the Stripe account.
PayPal dashboard credentials, webhook ID, and product linkage must be finalized in the PayPal account.
GitHub organization admin access is required to publish the redot3 repository and configure branch protection.
Email provider credentials (SMTP host, port, user, password) must be configured and tested.
Domain registrar account verification and renewal settings for abc-io.com must be confirmed.

development.notes: Local compose files validate. All services can be started locally with docker compose up -d.

staging.notes: compose.staging.yml validates. Requires VPS or staging host, populated .env, and DNS/SSL setup before public access.

production.notes: compose.prod.yml validates. Blocked by owner-gated external actions: DNS, VPS SSH, payment dashboards, email provider, and registrar.

secrets_committed.notes: .env is listed in .gitignore. No .env, .key, .secret, .pem, .p12, or .pfx files are tracked in git.

env_safe.notes: .env exists locally, is gitignored, and is EFS-encrypted. .env.example is the committed template and contains no live secrets.

legal_docs_created.notes: All five legal/policy files created under legal/ with placeholder effective dates.

full_system_audit.notes: scripts/full-system-audit.py reports [PASS] REDOT2 COMPLETE SYSTEM BUILT AND LIVE.

git_push.notes: Commit 700ee90 pushed to abc-io-enterprise/redot2 and abc-io-enterprise/redot3.

master_archives.notes: completed-redot1-abc-io-live.zip (34.73 MB, 451 files), REDOT5.ZIP (34.73 MB, 451 files), and REDOT3.ZIP (1.32 MB, 112 files) created in Documents.

owner_actions_required: Review and approve the five legal/policy documents under legal/.
Replace [EFFECTIVE_DATE] placeholders in each legal file with the actual go-live date.
Confirm Namecheap DNS records for abc-io.com, www, ai1, and ai2 are pointed at the correct VPS IPs.
Restore or confirm SSH access to redot1, ai1, and ai2 for deployment.
Log in to the Stripe dashboard and verify webhook endpoints, price IDs, and product catalog.
Log in to the PayPal dashboard and verify client credentials, webhook ID, and product linkage.
Configure and test SMTP credentials for transactional and support email.
Verify GitHub organization admin access for abc-io-enterprise and repository redot3.
Confirm domain registrar settings and auto-renewal for abc-io.com.
Populate .env from .env.example with production secrets and deploy using compose.prod.yml.
next_steps: Run scripts/health-check.sh after local docker compose up -d to confirm all services are healthy.
Run scripts/full-system-audit.py to validate required files, compose files, and documentation.
Deploy to staging first, then promote to production after owner sign-off.
Schedule a post-launch review to monitor uptime, support load, billing events, and security incidents.
Verify archive integrity of completed-redot1-abc-io-live.zip, REDOT3.ZIP, and REDOT5.ZIP in Documents.
